svg.title: Cloud Security Course Cohort 7 - Week 3: AWS Security and FinOps

g.text: IAM, VPC, KMS, WAF, CloudTrail, GuardDuty
Detect, log, and reduce blast radius
Role trust, SCP, Config, Security Hub, SIEM ready
Measure cost, rightsize, and tag everything
Budgets, idle cleanup, RI or SP planning, storage tiers
